notes.text:
An update is available for java-1.8.0-openjdk.
This update affects Rocky Linux 9.
A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE list
notes.title: Topic

notes.text:
The java-1.8.0-openjdk packages provide the OpenJDK 8 Java Runtime Environment and the OpenJDK 8 Java Software Development Kit.

Security Fix(es):

* OpenJDK: improper restrictions in CORBA deserialization (Serialization, 8285021) (CVE-2023-21830)

* OpenJDK: soundbank URL remote loading (Sound, 8293742) (CVE-2023-21843)

For more details about the security issue(s), including the impact, a CVSS score, acknowledgments, and other related information, refer to the CVE page(s) listed in the References section.

Bug Fix(es):

* Prepare for the next quarterly OpenJDK upstream release (2023-01, 8u362) [Rocky Linux-9] (BZ#2159912)

* solr broken due to access denied ("java.io.FilePermission" "/etc/pki/java/cacerts" "read") [Rocky Linux-9, openjdk-8] (BZ#2163594)

This advisory is provided by Ctrl IQ, Inc for Rocky Linux systems. For more information about CIQ security practices, visit https://ciq.com/security.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: * solr broken due to access denied ("java.io.FilePermission" "/etc/pki/java/cacerts" "read") [rhel-9, openjdk-8]
* Prepare for the next quarterly OpenJDK upstream release (2023-01, 8u362) [rhel-9]
Red Hat CSAF document for RHSA-2023:0210

document.title: Moderate: java-1.8.0-openjdk security and bug fix update
